approach: Add beaming scenario(s) to the frozen lifecycle.feature focus block: focus a unit in another workspace/tab -> attached view lands on its pane (workspace + tab + pane). Additive, freeze self-clears, no re-open.

Real production change: SessionAdapter.focus resolves the target pane's workspace_id + tab_id (herdr pane list/get, tmux list-panes format) and drives ws->tab->pane (herdr) / switch-client->select-window->select-pane (tmux). Extend LivePane to carry workspace/tab as needed.

Fail-loud on unresolvable ref / no known pane pre-enforced by resolveTarget before the adapter; adapter stays best-effort within. No frozen scenario narrowed -> no hard floor; self-assert both gates within leash.

why: 2 additive focus-beaming scenarios (cross-workspace/tab beam + no-false-success on a stale pane) on the frozen lifecycle.feature; gherkin-cli addOnly:true so freeze self-clears, stays @frozen, no re-open; cold sdd-spec-judge ALIGNED (oracle/builder/architect all PASS), no open markers; no floor (no frozen scenario narrowed).

cold sdd-impl-judge IMPLEMENTATION_PASS true; both new frozen focus scenarios (cross-workspace/tab beam + no-false-success on a stale pane) PASS with independently re-derived oracles, exercise-backstopped vs the pre-fix single-command code (e0b90275^); #128 focus error scenarios stay BOUND+PASS; CLI false-success structurally impossible (throw skips emit -> exit(1)); scope confined to the two adapters + parsePaneLocation helpers, focus signature unchanged. cyberlegion 359 tests green; root pnpm verify green. Advisory doc comment (session.ts focus) corrected in-session; verify-effect rule deferred to a follow-up CR. No floor.
